description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that builds Kobo kernel images. The workflow should trigger on workflow dispatch, push to master branch with specific path filters, and pull requests with specific path filters. It should use a matrix strategy to build kernel images for different models (glohd, aura2) with specific toolchains and configurations. The workflow should run on an ubuntu-latest environment, check out the repository and kernel source code, cache ccache and downloads, install dependencies, install the ARM toolchain, build the kernel, and upload the resulting uImage artifacts.
